description: Structured failure knowledge for AI agents — dead ends, workarounds, error chains. 2000+ error entries across 51 domains.
instructions: Use lookup_error BEFORE attempting to fix any error to avoid wasting time on known dead ends. Use search_errors for vague descriptions, get_error_detail for full info by ID, and get_error_chain to predict cascading failures.

tools.name: lookup_error
tools.description: Match an error message against deadends.dev's database of known errors. Returns dead ends (what NOT to try), workarounds (what works), and error chains (what comes next).

error_message.description: The full error message to look up

tools.name: get_error_detail
tools.description: Get full details for a specific error by its ID (e.g., 'python/modulenotfounderror/py311-linux').

tools.name: list_error_domains
tools.description: List all error domains and counts in the deadends.dev database.

sort_by.description: Sort domains by: 'count' (default, most errors first) or 'name' (alphabetical)

tools.name: search_errors
tools.description: Search errors by keyword across all domains. Uses fuzzy keyword search.

domain.description: Optional: filter to a specific domain (e.g., 'python', 'docker')

tools.name: list_errors_by_domain
tools.description: List all errors in a specific domain with their fix rates.

domain.description: The domain to list errors for (e.g., 'python', 'kubernetes')

tools.name: batch_lookup
tools.description: Look up multiple error messages at once. Returns the best match for each error.

error_messages.description: List of error messages to look up (max 10)

tools.name: get_domain_stats
tools.description: Get detailed statistics for a domain: error counts, average fix rate, resolvability breakdown.

domain.description: The domain to get stats for

tools.name: get_error_chain
tools.description: Traverse the error transition graph for a specific error. Shows leads_to, preceded_by, and frequently_confused_with.

error_id.description: The error ID (domain/slug/env) to get the transition graph for

resources.name: Error Domains
resources.description: All 51 error domains with error counts and coverage statistics

resources.name: Error Index
resources.description: Complete index of all error patterns with IDs, signatures, domains, and fix rates

prompts.name: debug_error
prompts.description: Get a structured debugging plan for an error, including dead ends to avoid and proven workarounds.

arguments.name: error_message
arguments.description: The full error message to debug

prompts.name: domain_overview
prompts.description: Get an overview of error patterns, fix rates, and common pitfalls for a specific technology domain.
